mapper.sql: a.id , a.company_id , GET_COMPANY_NM(a.company_id) company_name , (SELECT COUNT(1) FROM tb_stl_earning_list WHERE earning_id = a.id) AS cnt , a.create_id , GET_ADMIN_USER_NM(a.create_id) create_name , a.generate_date , a.create_date
mapper.select: SELECT count(1) FROM tb_stl_earning_list WHERE earning_id = #{searchEarningId}

SELECT id , earning_id , agency_name , app_date , open_date , mno , contract_num , acc_type , phone_num , acc_name , plan_name , status , create_date , create_id FROM tb_stl_earning_list WHERE earning_id = #{searchEarningId} ORDER BY id LIMIT #{offset}, #{recordSize}

SELECT id , earning_id , agency_name , app_date , open_date , mno , contract_num , acc_type , phone_num , acc_name , plan_name , status , create_date , create_id FROM tb_stl_earning_list WHERE earning_id = #{searchEarningId} ORDER BY id
